# netbox_asn_range (Resource)

Manages a NetBox ASN range.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `end` (Number) Ending ASN in the range.
- `name` (String) Name of the ASN range.
- `start` (Number) Starting ASN in the range.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the ASN range.
- `rir` (Number) RIR ID that allocated this range.
- `slug` (String) URL-friendly slug for the ASN range. Auto-generated from name if not provided.
- `tags` (Attributes List) Tags associated with this ASN range. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tags))
- `tenant` (Number) Tenant ID that owns this range.
- `upsert` (Boolean) If true, will find and use existing ASN range with matching name instead of creating a new one.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) NetBox internal ID.

<a id="nestedatt--tags"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tags`

Required:

- `name` (String) Tag name.
- `slug` (String) Tag slug.
